name: MerchMonk Vendors (Legacy Manifest)
description: Legacy app manifest retained for repository metadata compatibility. Deployment source of truth is the sibling cdk-app AWS/CDK stack, not this file.

CLIENT_ID.description: BigCommerce app client ID from the Developer Portal.

CLIENT_SECRET.description: BigCommerce app client secret from the Developer Portal.

ACCOUNT_UUID.description: BigCommerce account UUID used for API and OAuth configuration.

AUTH_CALLBACK.description: Fully qualified auth callback for the deployed or locally tunneled app.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string for Prisma. In AWS, credentials come from Secrets Manager and the Aurora/proxy endpoint provisioned by cdk-app.

JWT_KEY.description: JWT signing key. Must be at least 32 characters.

LOGIN_URL.description: BigCommerce login host for the configured environment.

API_URL.description: BigCommerce API host for the configured environment.
